mapper.sql: id, threads, runtime, delaytime, ifretry, ifoutinterval, ifcustomlistener, ifrecordlogjtl, ifrecordlogjmeter, ifbetweenvalue, threadname, `status`
mapper.update: update perf_config set status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where threadname = #{threadname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select
from perf_config order by id desc limit 1
mapper.insert:
insert into perf_config
id,
threads,
runtime,
delaytime,
ifretry,
ifoutinterval,
ifcustomlistener,
ifrecordlogjtl,
ifrecordlogjmeter,
ifbetweenvalue,
threadname,
`status`,

mapper.update:
update perf_config
threads = #{threads,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
runtime = #{runtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delaytime = #{delaytime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ifretry = #{ifretry,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ifoutinterval = #{ifoutinterval,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ifcustomlistener = #{ifcustomlistener,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ifrecordlogjtl = #{ifrecordlogjtl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ifrecordlogjmeter = #{ifrecordlogjmeter,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ifbetweenvalue = #{ifbetweenvalue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
threadname = #{threadname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update perf_config set threads = #{threads,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, runtime = #{runtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delaytime = #{delaytime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ifretry = #{ifretry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ifoutinterval = #{ifoutinterval,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ifcustomlistener = #{ifcustomlistener,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ifrecordlogjtl = #{ifrecordlogjtl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ifrecordlogjmeter = #{ifrecordlogjmeter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ifbetweenvalue = #{ifbetweenvalue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, threadname = #{threadname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
